ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Continued To Feb-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that it is 9:40 a.m. and there is no appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Ronald Althaus and the Attorney Scott Bassin to appear on February 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
